CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by defendant nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)
